channel.title: Tools on Classroom
channel.description: Recent content in Tools on Classroom

item.title: Forensic Tools
item.description: Curated reference list of digital forensic tools for disk analysis, memory forensics, network capture, and incident response investigations.

item.title: Msfvenom Psh
item.description: Create a Meterpreter reverse shell with PowerShell using MSFVenom — payload generation, listener setup, and session interaction.

item.title: MSFVenom Cheatsheet: Payload Generation & One-Liners Guide
item.description: A complete MSFVenom cheatsheet with one-liner payloads for Windows, Linux, macOS, and web shells. Includes examples for various formats and reverse shells.

item.title: Phishing Attack
item.description: Learn how phishing attacks work — types, techniques, real-world examples, and tools used in social engineering credential theft.

item.title: Volatility Installation in Linux
item.description: Step-by-step guide to installing Volatility 2 on Linux for memory forensics, including dependencies, Python setup, and verification.

item.title: Metasploit Cheat Sheet
item.description: Metasploit Framework cheat sheet — essential commands for exploits, payloads, sessions, meterpreter, and post-exploitation modules.

item.title: Awesome Powershell
item.description: Comprehensive PowerShell cheat sheet with essential commands, scripting techniques, and security-focused one-liners for penetration testing.
